case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. FRANK DENNY WINSTON

SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT WINSTON, FRANK DENNY (SBN 28599) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
